texto: Deception and self-deception are intimately intertwined. We fool ourselves in order to fool others, and we fool others in order to fool ourselves.
explicacao: Citação de Clancy Martin sobre esforço, persistência e resultados. “Deception and self-deception are intimately intertwined. We fool ourselves in order to fool other…” articula sucesso, philosophy, psychology em registro de sucesso, com relevância para contextos como psychology.

frase_original: Deception and self-deception are intimately intertwined. We fool ourselves in order to fool others, and we fool others in order to fool ourselves.

texto: we live now in circumstances that encourage rather than discourage lying; evidence and activity are more easily concealed, and the need to rely on demeanor as an indicator of a person’s truthfulness is greater. And our evolutionary history has not prepared us to be very sensitive to the behavioral clues relevant to lying.
